summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FoodHub delivery app after socket.io import fix. All 32 backend APIs passing, all 4 user role logins working, order tracking page loads correctly with real orders, home page features functional, delivery/owner dashboards working, persistent cart and cancel order functionality confirmed.
passed_tests: Admin login and dashboard with user management
Customer login and home page navigation
Restaurant Owner login and dashboard access
Delivery Partner login and dashboard with tabs/toggle
Order tracking page loads with real orders and status steps
Home page location bar and dialog functionality
Search functionality with instant dropdown results
Restaurant cards display with ratings and delivery times
Persistent cart bar on home page when items added
Add to cart functionality from restaurant pages
Cancel order dialog with reason validation
Navigation between pages with auth persistence
Order history page with 11 existing orders
